nasb.text: and Jason has welcomed them, and they all act contrary to the decrees of Caesar, saying that there is another king, Jesus.”

esv.text: and Jason has received them, and they are all acting against the decrees of Caesar, saying that there is another king, Jesus.”

cnv.text: 耶孫卻收留他們。這些人都違背凱撒的法令，說另外還有一個王耶穌。”

ccb.text: 耶孙接待了他们。他们违抗凯撒的命令，说另有一个王叫耶稣。”

csbs.text: 耶森竟接待了他们！这些人都违背了凯撒的谕令，说另外有一个王，就是耶稣。”
